tagline: The ai parse document function is now generally available.
what_it_does: The ai parse document function is now generally available. This function parses structured content from unstructured documents including PDFs, images, Word documents, and PowerPoint files. Documents are limited to a maximum of 500 pages and 100 MB.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: The ai parse document function is now generally available. This function parses structured content from unstructured documents including PDFs, images, Word documents, and PowerPoint files.
